invariant: BF5 — new code must conform to the captured CONVENTION_BASELINE, not canon defaults; CRITIQUE flags drift
load_bearing_assertion: CRITIQUE verdict == 'blocked' with a convention-drift issue (layout/naming/error-handling diverge from CONVENTION_BASELINE). Golden critique verdict == 'clean', drift_detected == false.
separates_from_golden_by: convention_drift_check.drift_detected (false in golden / true here) + critique verdict — the BF5 invariant.
